scene: 10k static instances, 64 dynamic lights, PBR + IBL + CSM + TAA + SMAA + Bloom + ACES + skinning + culling
notes: The file records the M4 target and the local deterministic validation performed in this workspace. A physical RTX 3060 run should replace measurement_status with measured_gpu and add measured_fps/driver/os fields before release tagging.
